calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15 AM: APPEARANCES FOR THURS, APR-12-2007, FOR TRIAL DE NOVO: RESPONDENT HELEN LOUBY IS PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA; APPELLANT AMINA JAAKSON ALSO PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DAY; MS. CAROL SACHAL IS PRESENT AS FRENCH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER FOR RESPONDENT HELEN LOUBY; ALL PARTIES SWORN AND THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO FRENCH INTERPRETER CAROL SACHAL. THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED.
RESPONDENT ADDRESSES THE COURT THROUGH INTERPRETER UNTIL 9:45AM; APPELLANT COMMENCES TO ADDRESS THE COURT AT 9:46 AM UNTIL 10:01 AM.
THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION; ALL EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT.

BOTH SIDES ARE INFORMED BY THE COURT THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION BY MAIL.

PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT A. MYLES; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem Paul Guiterrez, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
No appearance by Pro Per Respondent, Helene Louby. Appellant, Amina Jackson, appears in Pro Per. Ms. Jackson is sworn and presents her case in the narrative.
EXH(A)1 An email sent by Ms. Jackson.
10:35am
